task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains 'Mario Vega' or the search results display the patient 'Mario Vega'.
The patient dashboard or summary page for 'Mario Vega' is visible.
The 'Edit Demographics', 'Edit Patient', or similar form screen is open for Mario Vega.

task_completion.description: Enter the new Date of Birth
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date of Birth input fields in the edit form are filled with the values for 15 March 1980 (e.g., Day: 15, Month: March/03, Year: 1980).

task_completion.description: Save and verify the updated Date of Birth
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or details view is visible again, and the Date of Birth is now displayed as '15 Mar 1980' (or '15 March 1980' / '1980-03-15').

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS application is accessed via a standard web browser UI. There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands, API requests, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the actual UI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression through the OpenMRS UI (search -> edit form -> save). The agent must not use browser Developer Tools (Inspect Element) to superficially alter the displayed text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Python, bash, or other scripts being written or executed in a terminal or text editor to modify the patient data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is 'Mario Vega'. The target Date of Birth to be entered is '1980-03-15' (15 March 1980). On the OpenMRS patient dashboard, the successfully updated Date of Birth should display as '15 Mar 1980'.
